title: Transform Stratagene's XL-10 Gold Ultracompetent cells
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"7fpuu","text":"Protocol for transforming XL-10 GOld Ultracompetent cells from Stratagene (now Agilent). Protocol adopted from manufacturer's instructions.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"biu4a","text":"Use of 14-ml BD Falcon polypropylene round-bottom tubes: It is important that 14-ml BD Falcon polypropylene round-bottom tubes (BD Biosciences Catalog #352059) are used for the transformation protocol, since other tubes may be degraded by Î²-mercaptoethanol. In addition, the duration of the heat pulse has been optimized using these tubes.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":55}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"al8ki","text":"Aliquoting Cells: Keep the cells on ice at all times during aliquoting. It is essential that the polypropylene tubes are placed on ice before the cells are thawed and that the cells are aliquoted directly into pre-chilled tubes. It is also important to use 100 Î¼l of cells per transformation. Decreasing the volume will reduce efficiency.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":16}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"280f8","text":"Use of Î²-Mercaptoethanol (Î²-ME): Î²-ME has been shown to increase transformation efficiency. The Î²-ME mixture provided is diluted and ready to use. Stratagene cannot guarantee results with Î²-ME from other sources.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":33}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"du567","text":"Use of NZY+ Broth: Transformation of the supplied ultracompetent cells has been optimized using NZY+ as the medium for outgrowth following the heat pulse. Substitution with another outgrowth medium may result in a loss of efficiency.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":17}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"fg23j","text":"Quantity and Volume of DNA: The greatest efficiency is obtained from the transformation of 1 Î¼l of 0.01 ng/Î¼l supercoiled pUC18 DNA per 100 Î¼l of cells. When transforming a ligation mixture, add 2 Î¼l of the ligation mixtureper 100 Î¼l of cells. A greater number of colonies may be obtained by transforming up to 50 ng DNA, although the resulting efficiency (cfu/Î¼g) may be lower. The volume of the DNA solution added to the reaction may be increased to up to 10% of the reaction volume, but the transformation efficiency may be reduced.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":26}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"9q9g3","text":"Heat Pulse Duration and Temperature: Optimal transformation efficiency is observed when cells are heat-pulsed at 42Â°C for 30 seconds. Efficiency decreases sharply when cells are heat-pulsed for \u003c30 seconds or for \u003e40 seconds. Do not exceed 42Â°C.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":35}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"bnaqf","text":"Plating the Transformation Mixture: If plating \u003c100 Î¼l of cells, pipet the cells into a 200 Î¼l pool of medium and then spread the mixture with a sterile spreader. If plating â¥100 Î¼l, the cells can be spread on the plates directly. Tilt and tap the spreader to remove the last drop of cells. If desired, cells may be concentrated prior to plating by centrifugation at1000 rpm for 10 minutes followed by resuspension in 200 Î¼l of NZY+ medium.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":34}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}

steps: Pre-chill 14mL sterile culture tubes on ice
Pre-heat 0.9mL of NZY+ broth to 42°C undetermined NZY broth Contributed by users
Thaw XL-10 Gold Ultracompetent cells on ice then mix gently after completely thawed XL-10 Gold Ultracompetent cells Agilent Technologies Catalog #200314
Aliquot cells into pre-chilled sterile culture tubes undetermined XL-10 Gold Ultracompetent cells Agilent Technologies Catalog #200314
Add beta-mercaptoethanol undetermined XL-10 Gold Beta-mercaptoethanol mix Agilent Technologies
Swirl tube gently then incubate on ice for 10 minutes swirling gently every 2 minutes 00:10:00
Add 0.1-50ng of DNA or 2uL of ligation product undetermined
Swirl gently then incubate on ice for 30 minutes 00:30:00
Heat pulse tube at 42°C for exactly 30 seconds. The duration of the heat pulse is critical. 00:00:30
Incubate cells on ice for 2 minutes 00:02:00
Add 0.9mL of pre-heated NZY+ broth to each tube undetermined
Incubate at 37°C for 1 hour with shaking at 225-250 rpm 01:00:00
Plate no more than 200uL of transformation mixture per LB-agar plate with antibiotic selection
creator: Harold Bien
